template_metadata.name: Demo Video
template_metadata.author: Antares Agentic Environments
template_metadata.description: Audits product demonstration videos, evaluating both the spoken narrative and the live on-screen interactions for clarity and synchronization.

system_1_live_socket.primary_objective: Watch the screen recording and listen to the audio track. Provide real-time feedback on UI/UX explanations and narrative clarity. Interrupt if the visual actions do not match the spoken explanation.

few_shot_calibration.user_input: [Audio says 'click the action button' but screen shows clicking a drop-down menu]

expected_output.message: Your spoken explanation does not match the actions shown on screen.

few_shot_calibration.user_input: [Silence for fifteen seconds while the mouse cursor moves aimlessly without clicking]

expected_output.message: Prolonged silence during a complex visual sequence.

few_shot_calibration.user_input: Once we click generate, the data table populates instantly, as seen here.

expected_output.message: Narrative perfectly matches the visual action on screen.

rag_dictionary_injected.definition: The spoken explanation directly contradicts or fails to describe the actions happening on the screen.
Prolonged silence while complex actions are happening on screen without any guiding explanation.
Explaining a simple UI interaction using overly complex technical terms.

system_2_async_council.primary_objective: Analyze the sequence of on-screen actions and the corresponding transcript to determine if the product's core value proposition is clearly demonstrated.

rag_dictionary_injected.definition: The core feature being demonstrated is easy to follow and the visual sequence is logical.
The final result on screen clearly shows the benefit to the end user.
